title: DayX
description: This is a survival challenge mod where you can customize many properties.The difficulty of the game will increase with the increase of danger level/time, and you can decide the specific reinforcement values of the monsters.
body:
中文介绍

Diexv自定义启示录 - 末日生存挑战模组

欢迎来到末日世界！这是一个动态难度的生存挑战模组，随着时间推移，怪物会变得越来越强大。你能够生存多久？

🎮 核心玩法

手动激活机制
- 每个存档独立控制，使用 `/diexv_game true` 开启游戏
- 开启后所有功能立即生效，HUD显示危险等级和倒计时
- 随时可用 `/diexv_game false` 暂停游戏

危险等级系统
- 基于真实游戏时间的动态难度系统
- 默认每20分钟危险等级提升1级（可配置）
- 怪物属性随等级线性增长：生命值、攻击力、速度、护甲
- 玩家死亡会降低危险等级作为惩罚

怪物强化特性
- 全天候生成：怪物无视昼夜循环，白天也能生成
- 群体出现：怪物生成数量倍增至5倍
- 闪电苦力怕：33.3%概率自然生成为闪电苦力怕
- 亡灵不燃烧：僵尸、骷髅等亡灵生物白天不会燃烧
- 智能追踪：128格超远追踪距离，主动搜索玩家
- 穿墙能力：高等级时可绕过障碍物追踪

苦力怕特殊改造
- 移动速度提升至2倍
- 爆炸伤害降低至50%（平衡性调整）
- 遇到障碍物自动爆炸
- 闪电化后威力更恐怖

- ⚙️ 高度可配置

所有参数均可在配置文件中调整：
- 危险等级升级时间间隔
- 怪物各项属性成长百分比
- 胜利条件（目标危险等级）
- HUD显示位置和颜色
- 死亡惩罚等级数
- 苦力怕各项参数

🏆 胜利条件

达到配置的危险等级（默认100级）即可获得胜利！游戏状态会自动重置，你可以选择继续挑战更高难度。

💡 使用提示

1. 新建存档后，阅读聊天框中的欢迎消息
2. 准备好装备和基地后，执行 `/diexv_game true` 开始挑战
3. 注意观察HUD上的危险等级和倒计时
4. 合理规划资源，怪物会越来越强！
5. 死亡会降级，谨慎行动

---

English Introduction

Diexv Custom Apocalypse - Doomsday Survival Challenge Mod

Welcome to the apocalypse! This is a dynamic difficulty survival challenge mod where monsters become increasingly powerful over time. How long can you survive?

🎮 Core Gameplay

Manual Activation System
- Independent control per save file using `/diexv_game true` to start
- All features activate immediately with HUD displaying danger level and countdown
- Pause anytime with `/diexv_game false`

Danger Level System
- Dynamic difficulty based on real gameplay time
- Default: Danger level increases every 20 minutes (configurable)
- Monster attributes scale linearly with level: Health, Damage, Speed, Armor
- Player death reduces danger level as penalty

Monster Enhancement Features
- All-Weather Spawning: Monsters spawn regardless of day/night cycle
- Group Appearance: Monster spawn rate increased to 5x
- Lightning Creepers: 33.3% chance to naturally spawn as charged creepers
- Undead Immunity: Zombies, skeletons, and other undead don't burn in daylight
- Smart Tracking: 128-block ultra-long tracking range with active player search
- Wall-Climbing: Can bypass obstacles at higher danger levels

Special Creeper Modifications
- Movement speed doubled (2x)
- Explosion damage reduced to 50% (balance adjustment)
- Auto-detonation when encountering obstacles
- Even more terrifying when lightning-charged

⚙️ Highly Configurable

All parameters adjustable in configuration files:
- Danger level upgrade time interval
- Monster attribute growth percentages
- Victory conditions (target danger level)
- HUD display position and colors
- Death penalty level reduction
- Creeper-specific parameters

🏆 Victory Conditions

Reach the configured danger level (default: 100) to achieve victory! Game state automatically resets, allowing you to continue challenging even higher difficulties.

💡 Usage Tips

1. After creating a new world, read the welcome message in chat
2. Prepare your equipment and base, then execute `/diexv_game true` to begin
3. Monitor the danger level and countdown on your HUD
4. Plan resources carefully - monsters will get stronger!
5. Death causes level reduction, so act cautiously
